Name: UDrawFrustumComponent
Description: Utility component for drawing a view frustum. Origin is at the component location, frustum points down position X axis.

Variables.Name: FrustumColor
Variables.Description: Color to draw the wireframe frustum.

Variables.Name: FrustumAngle
Variables.Description:
Angle of longest dimension of view shape. 
	   If the angle is 0 then an orthographic projection is used

Variables.Name: FrustumAspectRatio
Variables.Description: Ratio of horizontal size over vertical size.

Variables.Name: FrustumStartDist
Variables.Description: Distance from origin to start drawing the frustum.

Variables.Name: FrustumEndDist
Variables.Description: Distance from origin to stop drawing the frustum.

Variables.Name: Texture
Variables.Description: optional texture to show on the near plane
